props.ChoiceText: You brought uncertain water into clearer form and found that a good chart can outlive a brave man.
props.ChoiceBio: Charting a coastline taught you how exact work can survive where memory and boasting fail.

0.TransitionText: Because charting a coastline taught you how exact work can survive where memory and boasting fail, distance and risk still felt more natural than home.
0.TransitionPrompt: This could carry you into Explorer, but you may remain on your current path instead.

1.TransitionText: Because charting a coastline taught you how exact work can survive where memory and boasting fail, the next unknown road lay across water more often than land.
1.TransitionPrompt: This could carry you into Sailor, but you may remain on your current path instead.

2.TransitionText: Because charting a coastline taught you how exact work can survive where memory and boasting fail, far horizons made you attentive to signs above as much as roads below.
2.TransitionPrompt: This could carry you into Astrologer, but you may remain on your current path instead.
